meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for Scaling Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade software at lightning speed. Advanced tutorial.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates boilerplate by providing an AI-ready, production-grade scaffold. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate complex architectural decisions, allowing you to move from MVP to high-fidelity SaaS in hours rather than weeks. This workflow is the definitive path to escaping the 'basic app' trap.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you're stuck in a loop of CRUD-heavy, uninspired builds that barely satisfy your clients and do nothing for your portfolio. You're trading hours for dollars on low-leverage work, watching as the market demands sophisticated AI integration that feels just out of reach. 

The ceiling isn't your coding ability; it's your tooling. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you transition from manual labor to automated architecture. We’re stripping away the friction of setup so you can focus on the high-value logic that actually scales.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure modularity and ease of AI-driven refactoring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project with a standard production-ready stack (Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase) and strict TypeScript enforcement.

steps.title: Inject Domain Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out your business requirements based on the Antigravity architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and implement a robust authentication middleware and user onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication flow using Supabase and verify against Antigravity standards'

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Ensure your database schema evolves in sync with your frontend components without manual SQL headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a migration script for a multi-tenant user database schema compatible with the current project structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create migration for multi-tenant users and define RLS policies'

steps.title: Component Library Integration
steps.description: Rapidly deploy professional UI components that match your client's brand identity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity UI component library patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a dashboard layout with sidebar and protected routes using Antigravity components'

steps.title: Production Hardening
steps.description: Perform final security and performance audits to ensure the app is ready for client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the code for security vulnerabilities and optimize the bundle size for production deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'perform security audit and suggest performance improvements for production deployment'

pro_tips: Always define your 'Context Window' in the .clauderc file to keep Claude focused on the Antigravity architecture patterns.
Use custom Antigravity templates for your most frequent client requests to reduce setup time to zero.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' command on every pull request to maintain high-quality code standards automatically.
Keep your database schema definitions in a dedicated 'schema.json' file so Claude can reference it during every prompt session.
Implement automated E2E tests immediately after scaffold generation to ensure your AI-generated code never breaks core functionality.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your workflow to identify the most repetitive tasks. Build custom Antigravity templates for these to turn your freelance business into a productized agency.
content.conversion_block: Stop building basic apps and start shipping enterprise software. Your clients are waiting for the next level of quality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
